top_signals.title: Japan’s Super-Long Bonds See First Foreign Outflow Since 2024
top_signals.summary: Overseas investors sold more Japan’s super-long government bonds than they bought for the first time in well over a year as the market grappled with concerns about inflation and increased fiscal spending.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
